questions.question: Describe the primary function of virtual memory in an operating system. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the concept of virtual memory and its role in memory management

questions.question: What is the difference between physical memory and virtual memory? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Provide a brief explanation of the two types of memory

questions.question: Explain the concept of paging and segmentation in virtual memory management. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the paging and segmentation techniques and their benefits
